titleStmt.title: SII 41.13: original edition by S. Rajagopal
No. 13. (A.R. No. 13 of 1905.) Kīḻūr, Tirukkoyilur Taluk, South Arcot District.

summary.p: South wall of the maṇḍapa in front of the central shrine in the Vīraṭṭāṉēśvara temple.

This records the gift of 100 sheep by Irāman Mummuḍisōlar, for burning a perpetual lamp on Uttaramayanana-Saṅkrānti to the deity Tiruvīraṭṭāṇam-Uḍaiya Mahādēva at Tirukkōvalūr in Kuṟukkaikūṟṟam, a district of Jananāthavaḷanāḍu alias Milāḍu, for the merit of his mother Rājaśēkharaṉ Umai-Naṅgaiyār alias Milāḍa-mādēviyār, daughter of Munṇṉaiyavaraiyar and wife of Paṭṭālakaṉ Irāman alias Arumoḻideva-Milāḍudaiyār. Also records the gift of lamp, weighing 210 palam, by the weighing scale velḷḻikkōl of Tirukkōvalūr and a white metal vessel weighing 40 palams by the same kōl for offering water to the god.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
svastiśrī . kopparakecaripanmarāṉa śrīrājen=tara coḻadevaṟku yāṇṭu 3āvatu
milāṭāṉa jaṉanāta vaḷanāṭṭuk kuṟukkaik kūṟṟattut tirukkovalūr tiruvīra
ṭṭāṉamuṭaiya mahādevaṟku milāṭuṭaiyārpaṭṭālakaṉ Irāmaṉāṉa Arumoḻideva mi
lāṭuṭaiyār deviyār muṉṉaiyavaraiyar makaḷār rājacekaraṉ Umai naṅkai
yārāṉa milāṭamādeviyārkkāka Ivarmakaṉār Irāmaṉ mummuṭicco
ḻar Ivvāṇṭai Uttaramayaṉa saṅgrān=tiyil vaiytta tirunan=tāvi
ḷakku Oṉṟukku vaiytta cāvāmuvāp perāṭu nūṟum Ittirunan=tā
viḷakku niṉṟeriyat tirukkovalūr nakarattu veḷḷik kolā
l karuvuḷppaṭa niṟai Irunūṟṟu Orupatiṉ palattiṉāl Iṭṭa tarāviḷa
kkoṉṟu taṇṇīr Amurtuk karakam vaiykka Ikkolāl nirai nā
ṟpatiṉ palattāl vaitta pittaḷaik karakakkāl Oṉṟum Ivai śa
ntrādittavaṟ panmāheśvararakṣai .
Digital edition of SII 41.13 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
